name: EuiSubSteps
description: Nested sub-steps inside an EuiSteps item.
visualDescription: A compact nested list of sub-items indented inside an EuiSteps step body. Appears as a tighter, lower-prominence stack of numbered or bulleted items below a step's title. No circular badge — uses plain numbering or bullets. NOT a top-level EuiSteps list.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.
